prompt: You are given a list of tickers and their daily closing prices in "data.csv". Implement a function most_corr that accepts a dataframe of closing prices and returns a tuple of the two tickers with the highest correlation based on daily percentage changes. Output the result to "most_corr_output.csv" with columns "Ticker 1" and "Ticker 2".
expected: 1. Data exploration: Summary Statistics Comparison — daily percentage changes computed correctly. 2. Predictive modeling: Model Accuracy — correlation matrix built, most correlated pair identified and saved to most_corr_output.csv.
